title: Export fields of the DockerIgnore struct
body:
export fields in DockerIgnore struct for implementing the dockerignore in libpod
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
What's the ask here? Why does Libpod need to know about .dockerignore?
@nalind or @rhatdan do either of you no why we need to add @QiWang19 to the white list still?  She's a member of Buildah with Write privs
Code LGTM, but I'm really curious as to what we're going to do with this in libpod land.

The goal is to provide dockerignore functionality for podman build like @QiWang19 just did for buildah bud (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/699).  However you may be right, I'm not sure that we need to export these variables to make that work....

`dockr cp` can also exclude files in .dockerignore.
make `podman cp` do the same with `docker cp` if `.dockerignore` exists
